title: Jon Clarke (rugby league)
extract: Jon Clarke (born 4 April 1979) is an English former professional rugby league player who played as a hooker. Jon is currently Head of Performance at Manly-Warringah Sea Eagles in the NRL.He was previously the strength & conditioning coach for the England and British & Irish Lions rugby union teams. He played for the Wigan Warriors, London Broncos, Warrington Wolves and Widnes Vikings.
